response.step_by_step_log: I reviewed the video to identify any vocal musical performances. The video is largely a static teaser for 'Pavolia Reine Birthday 2025' until the 04:11 mark. From 04:11 until the end (05:00), there is an introduction of guest characters accompanied by an instrumental background track. I carefully listened to this track for any lyrical content; the track consists only of production music and non-lyrical vocal chops/samples. As there are no full vocal songs with intelligible lyrics, I concluded there is no vocal music in this video. A search for 'Pavolia Reine Birthday 2025 Guests + Announcement trailer music' did not yield a specific song title for this background track, further supporting the conclusion that it is generic production music without lyrics. Therefore, no songs were identified, and no lyric searches were performed.
response.global_summary: A teaser video for the 'Pavolia Reine Birthday 2025' event, featuring a 4-minute static promotional image followed by a character introduction sequence set to an instrumental background track.

scenes.description: A static promotional image displaying the event title, date, and time. No background music is playing.
A character introduction sequence with various guests appearing on screen. The audio consists of an instrumental background dance/electronic track without any intelligible vocal lyrics.
